summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sus10 AI hyperlocal climate action platform. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate), frontend mostly working with key pages operational but some content loading issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Page navigation works but content doesn't load - blank page after search
Page navigation works but content doesn't display properly

integration_issues.flow: Data loading on search and providers pages
integration_issues.issue: 401 authentication errors in console when loading page data

passed_tests: Landing page with hero, search bar, stats display
Building detail/report page with all tabs working
Initiative pages loading and displaying correctly
Button interactions and basic UI elements
Professional design with good visual hierarchy

success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Core pages work, search/providers have content loading issues

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix content loading issues on BuildingSearchPage and ProvidersPage - pages navigate correctly but display blank content. Investigate 401 authentication errors affecting data loading. Both issues appear to be API integration problems rather than UI component issues.
